exercise_details.name: Back Squat or Goblet Squat
exercise_details.notes: Use barbell if available; choose weight allowing good depth and control. Goblet squat if no barbell. Prioritize knee tracking and neutral spine.

exercise_details.name: Romanian Deadlift / Kettlebell Deadlift
exercise_details.notes: Hinge from hips, maintain long spine. Reduce weight if hamstrings pull or form breaks.

exercise_details.name: Overhead Press or Dumbbell Bench Press
exercise_details.notes: Choose seated DB press or barbell overhead press according to shoulder comfort. Keep scapular control.

exercise_details.name: Bent-over Row or Single-arm DB Row
exercise_details.notes: Full range, control the eccentric. Avoid rounding the lower back.

exercise_details.name: Reverse Lunges
exercise_details.notes: Step back to a controlled position; pace controlled to build single-leg strength and balance.

exercise_details.name: Glute Bridge / Hip Thrust
exercise_details.notes: Squeeze glutes at top, avoid overarching the lower back. Use added load progressively.

exercise_details.name: Plank / Dead Bug
exercise_details.notes: Focus on breathing and maintaining a neutral spine. Scale hold time to ability.

safety_notes: Warm up thoroughly; do not lift heavy with cold muscles.
Prioritize technique over load—reduce weight if form deteriorates.
